summary: Director dashboard refactor tested successfully. EscalationsCard now shows ONLY coach_escalation type (inbound triage inbox). Your Outbox pulse bar shows 4 metrics for director-created actions (review_request + pipeline_escalation). Old DirectorActionsCard full list removed. 14 backend tests passed, 11 frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend mission_control.py correctly splits: escalations (coach_escalation only) + outbox_summary (review_request + pipeline_escalation)
DirectorActionsPulse.js correctly receives outboxSummary prop and displays 4 metrics
EscalationsCard correctly shows only coach_escalation items with 'Open Pod' navigation
DirectorView.js correctly passes data.outbox_summary to DirectorActionsPulse
CoachView.js import cleanup verified - DirectorActionsCard import removed
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 4 coach_escalation (2 open, 1 acknowledged, 1 resolved), 11 director-created (8 review_request + 3 pipeline_escalation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Director dashboard refactor complete. Key changes: (1) EscalationsCard shows only coach_escalation type (director's inbound triage inbox), (2) Your Outbox pulse shows stats for review_request + pipeline_escalation (director's outbound tracking), (3) DirectorActionsCard full list removed. API returns: escalations array (coach_escalation only) + outbox_summary object with 4 metrics. UI verified: Hero > Escalations > Your Outbox > Program Brief order.
